channel.title: NetworkManager on sanntid.org
channel.description: Recent content in NetworkManager on sanntid.org

item.title: e1000e: Detected Hardware Unit Hang
item.author: arnulf.heimsbakk@gmail.com (Arnulf Heimsbakk)
item.description: Are you, as I, suffering from Detected Hardware Unit Hang in the kernel log from an e1000e network card? How do you notice it. A transfer goes to zero bytes for around 10 seconds, then restarts, then goes to zero, then restarts and so on…
